name: xAI
description: Registers xAI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback xAI API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: xAI API key
settings.description: xAI API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to XAI_API_KEY.

providers.name: xAI
providers.description: Refreshes xAI chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
